site.title: AgencyOS — The Operating System for Creative Agencies
site.description: All-in-one platform for marketing & creative production agencies. Manage projects, teams, clients, and finances.

home.heroTitle: The Operating System for Creative Agencies
home.heroSubtitle: Manage projects, teams, clients, finances, and content — all in one platform built for marketing and creative production.
home.featuresSubtitle: From lead management to final delivery — AgencyOS covers the entire creative workflow.

featuresList.projectsDesc: Kanban boards, Gantt charts, time tracking, and workload management.
featuresList.attendanceDesc: GPS check-in, leave management, payroll, and performance reviews.
featuresList.financeDesc: Quotations, invoices, expenses, multi-currency support, and payment tracking.
featuresList.contentDesc: Content calendar, AI-powered tools, brand frameworks, and client approval.
featuresList.crmDesc: Lead tracking, deal pipeline, client portal, and smart integrations.
featuresList.reportsDesc: Real-time dashboards, financial reports, and exportable insights.

home.ctaSubtitle: Start your free 14-day trial. No credit card required.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run your creative agency efficiently.
features.projectManagementDesc: Kanban boards, task assignments, Gantt charts, milestones, and workload balancing across teams.
features.attendanceHrDesc: GPS-based check-in/out, leave requests, overtime tracking, payroll processing, and performance reviews.
features.financialDesc: Multi-currency quotations and invoices, expense tracking, payment reconciliation, and profit analysis.
features.contentStudioDesc: Content calendar, brand briefs, AI content generation, revision workflows, and client approval portal.
features.crmSalesDesc: Lead management, deal pipeline tracking, quotation generation, and client communication history.
features.equipmentExhibitionsDesc: Equipment booking with conflict detection, QR code tracking, exhibition planning, booth management, and settlement.
features.integrationsDesc: Telegram notifications, AI content tools (24+ tools), exchange rate automation, and webhook system.
features.multiTenantDesc: Support for multiple agencies, white-label branding, custom domains, and role-based access control.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your agency. Upgrade anytime.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.a2: Yes, all plans come with a 14-day free trial on the Professional plan. No credit card required.
faq.a3: Yes, AgencyOS is fully bilingual in Arabic and English with full RTL support.
faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a4: We accept international payments via Stripe (USD) and local Iraqi payments via FIB, ZainCash, and bank transfer.

about.title: About AgencyOS
about.subtitle: Built for creative agencies, by creative agency operators.
about.missionDesc: To empower creative and marketing production agencies with the tools they need to deliver exceptional work efficiently. We believe great creative work deserves great operational support.
about.storyDesc: AgencyOS was born from the challenges of running a real production agency in Iraq. We experienced firsthand the pain of juggling spreadsheets, separate tools, and manual processes. Built initially for Ru'ya for Artistic Production, AgencyOS has grown into a comprehensive platform serving agencies across the Middle East.

values.qualityDesc: Every feature is built to production-grade standards with comprehensive testing.
values.bilingualDesc: Full Arabic and English support, not an afterthought — from day one.
values.localFirstDesc: Built for the unique needs of the Middle Eastern market, including local payment gateways and cultural considerations.
values.securityDesc: Enterprise-grade security with row-level security, audit logging, and data encryption.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AgencyOS respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

sections.dataDesc: We collect information you provide when signing up: name, email, company details, and payment information. We also collect usage data to improve our service.
sections.usageDesc: We use your data to provide and improve the service, process payments, send notifications, and comply with legal obligations.
sections.sharingDesc: We never sell your data. We may share with trusted service providers (Stripe, Resend, Cloudflare) who are bound by data processing agreements.
sections.rightsDesc: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. Contact us at privacy@agencyos.app.
sections.securityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption at rest and in transit, regular audits, and access controls.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using AgencyOS, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

sections.serviceDesc: AgencyOS provides a SaaS platform for marketing and creative production agency management. We grant you a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the service during your subscription period.
sections.paymentsDesc: Subscription fees are billed monthly or annually as selected. Payments are processed securely via Stripe or local Iraqi payment gateways. Refunds are handled per our refund policy.
sections.responsibilitiesDesc: You are responsible for maintaining confidentiality of your account credentials, ensuring data accuracy, and complying with applicable laws.
sections.limitationsDesc: AgencyOS is provided 'as is' without warranty. We are not liable for indirect damages or loss of data beyond the amount paid for the service.
sections.terminationDesc: Either party may terminate at any time. On termination, your data will be retained for 90 days before anonymization per our data retention policy.
